fare.title: Fare
fare.description: Represents a fare for a specific route and class.

route.description: The route for the fare, e.g., NYC-LAX.

class.description: The class of the fare, e.g., Economy, Business.

status.description: The status of the fare (e.g., Active, Draft, Inactive).

version.description: The version number of the fare record.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the fare was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the fare was last updated.
